description: A BKK annotation pinned to a span in a premodern Chinese text. The payload is intentionally free-form so different annotation kinds (form / sense / concept / translation / metadata) can share one record type. See docs/bkk-annotations/README.md for the payload conventions and the archive-side counterpart. Renamed from org.bunkankun.annotation in 2026.

edition.description: Short edition id within the source text (e.g. tls, CK-KZ).

payload.description: Free-form annotation content. Shape per source role; see docs/bkk-annotations/README.md.

sourceRole.description: What kind of annotation this is in the source pipeline. Defaults to bsky:org.bunkankun.annotation.note when produced by this lexicon.

supersedes.description: CID of a prior record this one replaces.
